residual_requirements.requirement: Every API host on the internet works with the bridge.

detail.reason: The proof covers compatible host shapes, committed Gemini/OpenAI-compatible live runs, local OpenAI-compatible shims, current typed readiness, and a reusable candidate-host acceptance gate. It does not prove every API host on the internet.

residual_requirements.requirement: Paid/keyed hosts have completed live tool-calling runs.

detail.reason: Additional live tool-calling runs for paid/keyed roster targets require billing/API-key/access state beyond this no-spend gate; the external-state audit, live-smoke queue, and runner ledger record the current typed blockers and exact retry evidence.
